name: Princess Andromethia
description: A kind fairy princess whose domain, the Blossom Fields, is populated by creatures half-elf and half-satyr. Her lands of hills and meadows instill a feeling close to ecstasy. Lucien was drawn into her realm in Session 3 and did not return for five days.
notes: Lucien was taken to her Blossom Fields in Session 3 and remained there for five days.
Holds lands in the mortal realm as well, somewhere in the south of Dolmenwood.
